completed_tasks.name: Body rendering: per-body hue/radius/emissive/OmniLight/dither (verified + APPROVED, ambient-floor lighting accepted for MVP)

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 3: FlightController arcade model (virtual joystick, roll, persistent throttle + full-stop, distance-to-surface speed envelope, crosshair/reticle)
Wave 4: Full minimal HUD (adaptive units, context label, target readout, edge marker, phosphor-green)

decisions.decision: 01-02 human-verify APPROVED; ambient-floor-only lighting (ambient_light_energy=0.08) accepted for the MVP — cross-space directional terminator DEFERRED
decisions.rationale: In Planet space the star is not in the render set (RND-02) so there is no point light in frame; ambient floor is the accepted MVP stand-in. No day/night terminator while orbiting in Planet space.

decisions.decision: Render in scaled UNIT-space, not 1:1 meters: RenderBridge uses UniVec3.ToLocalDoubleUnits(ship) x per-space RenderFactor; camera far = 1e6 render units
decisions.rationale: 1:1-meters rendering forced far=1e12 which broke Godot's light culler (prepare_camera) and destroyed depth precision. SUPERSEDES locked decision D-15.

decisions.decision: ToLocalDoubleUnits uses the OBSERVER's scale as the single per-frame unit basis; parent body rendered at -ship.LocalPos, siblings via ToLocalDoubleUnits
decisions.rationale: Consistent per-frame basis for positions and radii; parent.LocalPos is in the GRANDPARENT frame so it sits at the ship-frame origin.

decisions.decision: Worktrees auto-degraded to sequential (no origin/HEAD); plans run sequentially on main tree
decisions.rationale: worktree base-check shouldDegrade=true in this local-only repo.

next_action: Execute Wave 3 (plan 01-03 FlightController) via /gsd-execute-phase 01. Spawn a gsd-executor (model sonnet, sequential, main tree); BRIEF it on the unit-space render architecture and have it read 01-01-SUMMARY.md + 01-02-SUMMARY.md. Executor runs auto tasks, writes SUMMARY, and STOPS at the human-verify checkpoint without marking the plan complete or touching ROADMAP/STATE — the orchestrator finalizes after the user verifies.
context_notes: Mid /gsd-execute-phase 1. Phase has 4 plans = 4 waves, fully sequential dependency chain, all autonomous:false (each ends in a human-verify checkpoint). 01-01 and 01-02 complete & approved. Render architecture is scaled unit-space (supersedes original plan phrasing about 1:1 render meters); read 01-01-SUMMARY.md + 01-02-SUMMARY.md before touching render math.
